sections.paragraph:
m. i.q. גָּלָל No. 1, dung of men. In sing. once, Job 20:7, כְּגֶלְלֹו לָנֶצַח יֹאבֵד according to Chald. and Vulg. rightly, “sicut stercus suum in œternum peribit;” as to this comparison, by which ignominious destruction is denoted, see 1Ki 14:10.

Pl. גְּלָלִים dung, pr. globules of dung, Zep 1:17 specially human, Eze 4:12, 15 Eze 4:15.
